attributes.action: Ban smoking in all public spaces
attributes.background: I want the Government to take action because everyone has the right to breathe clean, safe air in public spaces. Currently, non-smokers—including children, pregnant women, and people with asthma—are forced to inhale 'secondhand' smoke and vape clouds without a choice.

rejection.details:
We have a petition open on this subject already, which you may wish to sign:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/749022
